ai_architecture.pattern_rationale: Autonomy score <=5: deterministic pipeline controls all flow; AI is invoked at specific steps for scoring, summarization, analysis, and generation. No autonomous agent loop or dynamic tool selection needed.
ai_architecture.strands_rationale: Direct Bedrock API calls are appropriate for structured input/output LLM tasks within a deterministic pipeline. Strands SDK adds unnecessary complexity when there is no agent loop, tool selection, or multi-turn conversation.

prompt_engineering.output_format: JSON structured output with regex extraction + validation
prompt_engineering.fallback_strategy: Q-Code rule-based classification on parse failure
prompt_engineering.domain_optimization: Aviation NOTAM domain: ICAO terminology, Jeju Air route network context, REF BOOK registration patterns

tool_complexity.rationale: No tools. Direct LLM calls with structured I/O.

role_separation.rationale: No conflicting roles. Each function is a single-purpose LLM call.

flow_complexity.rationale: Linear pipeline. No branching, loops, or dynamic routing.

ai_functions.description: NOTAM importance scoring with structured JSON output
Crew briefing package (DISP Comment + Company NOTAM + Crew Briefing)
Route deviation decision guidance with structured comparison

files_created.description: Bedrock service refactored to use AI module
